name: United States Immunodeficiency Network (USIDNET)
abstract: United States Immunodeficiency Network (USIDNET) is a NIAID supported IID repository that includes clinical data.
description: The United States Immunodeficiency Network (USIDNET) is a research consortium established to advance scientific research in the field of immunodeficiencies/inborn errors of immunity. We have several goals:     - Collection of phenotype data using automated data extraction to populate a freely accessible registry    - Facilitation of studies on outcomes and phenotypes using USIDNET data    - Matchmaking services to connect clinicians and researchers    - Collaboration with ClinGen, OMIM, MONDO and HPO to improve data in other databases    - Development of do-it-yourself (DIY) data access points    - Mentoring of trainees
